params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME enter or attack, each opponent exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card.
Whenever CARDNAME enter or attack, each opponent exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card.
Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, you may cast a card exiled with CARDNAME without paying its mana cost.
